title: Define Rich Edit Box Properties
text: Define Rich Edit Box Properties Define the properties for this rich edit box widget. For more information, see urtfeditbox (RichEditBox) . How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
